title: Leadership Principles
placeholder: Describe your core leadership principles and how they guide your decisions...

title: Communication Style
placeholder: How do you prefer to communicate? What formats, cadences, and channels work best for you?

title: Decision-Making Style
placeholder: How do you approach decisions? What frameworks or mental models do you use?

title: Meeting Style
placeholder: How do you run meetings? What makes a meeting effective in your experience?

title: Risk Management Style
placeholder: How do you identify, assess, and manage risks? What's your risk tolerance?

title: Stakeholder Management Style
placeholder: How do you manage stakeholders? What's your approach to alignment and buy-in?

title: Delivery Governance Style
placeholder: How do you govern delivery? What metrics and rituals do you rely on?

title: Coaching Style
placeholder: How do you develop and coach your team? What's your mentoring approach?

title: Reporting Style
placeholder: How do you report status and progress? What does a good status update look like to you?

title: AI Usage Style
placeholder: How do you use AI tools in your work? What are your principles for AI-assisted work?
